displayDescription.zh: 扩散模型学习逆转逐步加噪过程。早期热力学形式成为后来的去噪扩散概率模型和现代文生图系统的基础。
displayDescription.en: Diffusion models learn to reverse a gradual noising process. The early thermodynamic formulation became a foundation for later denoising diffusion probabilistic models and modern text-to-image systems.

title.en: Deep Unsupervised Learning using Nonequilibrium Thermodynamics
title.zh: 使用非平衡热力学进行深度无监督学习

description.en: PMLR source card for Diffusion Model.
description.zh: PMLR 的扩散模型资料卡片。

license.en: Reference link only; local explainers are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地解释图为原创重绘。

html.zh: 扩散模型学习逆转逐步加噪过程。早期热力学形式成为后来的去噪扩散概率模型和现代文生图系统的基础。
html.en: Diffusion models learn to reverse a gradual noising process. The early thermodynamic formulation became a foundation for later denoising diffusion probabilistic models and modern text-to-image systems.

html.zh: 训练中数据被逐步破坏成噪声，神经网络学习把噪声反向还原为样本的步骤。 互动演示会突出这些步骤如何把资料线索与可见的系统行为连接起来。
html.en: Data is slowly corrupted into noise during training, and a neural network learns the reverse steps that turn noise back into samples. The interactive demo focuses on the steps that connect the source material to the visible system behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把扩散模型视为 GAN 和 VAE 之后的主要生成模型家族之一。它的长期影响在于迭代去噪配方支撑了许多高质量图像、音频和视频生成器。
html.en: Experts generally treat diffusion models as one of the major generative-model families after GANs and VAEs. Its long-term legacy is the iterative denoising recipe that powers many high-quality image, audio, and video generators.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
